title: hibbertia australis
intro: Hibbertia australis, also known as Guinea flower, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia australis include its ability to treat wounds, soothe skin irritations, and potentially reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a tea or tincture from the leaves, flowers, and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
